Icons: direct Iconify collections

This example demonstrates live icon updates powered by ui(...) and cell(...), using direct CDN/Iconify sources only.

Controls (live)

Programmatic icon(...)

lucide:home
Uses icon(name, source, { size }).

Default catalog <ui-icon>

lucide:home
No explicit sources passed. Collections are fetched from CDN.

Explicit source <ui-icon-cdn>

lucide:home
Uses install("ui-icon-cdn", { source: "https://api.iconify.design" }).

Quick picks
